name: Granny Smith Apple Sorbet
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice 5 of the apples and puree in a food blender or food processor.
2. Chop the sixth apple finely.
3. Combine all ingredients and whisk together until sugar is dissolved.
4. Pour into 1 1/2 quart (or larger) electric or hand-operated ice cream makers.
5. Process until firm, following manufacturer's instructions.
6. Serve immediately or freeze for later use.
